name: why-type-twice
description: Auto-completes React useState destructuring: type `const [value,` and get `setVarName] = React.useState()` inserted automatically.

enumDescriptions: Read the current file's imports and use the matching style; auto-adds `import { useState } from 'react'` if no React import is found
Always use React.useState() — assumes `import React from 'react'`
Always use useState() — assumes `import { useState } from 'react'`
usestateSetter.importStyle.description: Controls the hook call style inserted by the completion. 'autoDetect' (default) reads the file's imports.
